fix_summary: Localized fix in `search_flights` now uppercases destination input before comparison, matching uppercase-stored airport codes. Added a focused regression test for lowercase destination search input. Automated tests passed.
approval_reasons: The implementation directly addresses the reported case-sensitivity mismatch in the flight search service.
The change is localized to `backend/app/services/flight_service.py` and does not alter unrelated filters.
The added regression test covers the accepted scenario and the automated test suite passed (6/6).
